# BUG REPORT TEMPLATE

> [!WARNING]
> Please ensure you have scrubbed your execution logs of sensitive tokens/passwords before submitting.

### Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the deployment bug is.

### Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to Codespaces terminal.
2. Run command `terraform apply -auto-approve`.
3. See error.
